Para Raheem — copiar y pegar en LinkedIn

Raheem — the mapping is accurate. The direct alignments you identified are correct, and the gaps you flagged are by design, not omissions. ATF receipts are delegation-complete at construction — they don't carry a runtime admissibility decision (ALLOW/REFUSED/DENY) because that decision belongs to the executing layer, not the delegation record. The consequence_class and GCS fields are outside ATF scope by the same principle — they're governance enrichment that lives on your side of the boundary. The bridge architecture you proposed is the right model: ATF receipt embeds as-is (immutable core), VGS wraps the governance layers around it, joint_hash = hash(atf_receipt_hash + vgs_connector_hash). That structure preserves independent verifiability for both sides, which is the critical property. Here is the ATF Open Receipt Schema — ATORS v1.0.0 (ADR-172). Field names, hash contracts, canonical JSON algorithm, and signing convention are all inside: { "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#", "$id": "https://omnixquantum.com/schemas/atf-open-receipt-schema/1.0.0", "title": "OMNIX ATF Open Receipt Schema", "version": "1.0.0", "issued_by": "OMNIX QUANTUM LTD", "issued_date": "2026-05-20", "adr_references": ["ADR-156","ADR-157","ADR-158","ADR-159","ADR-171","ADR-172"], "rfc_references": ["RFC-ATF-1","RFC-ATF-2","RFC-ATF-3"], "canonical_json_algorithm": { "steps": ["1. Exclude: content_hash, pqc_signature, pqc_algorithm, pqc_signature_a, pqc_signature_b, sac_content_hash, spv_hash", "2. json.dumps(fields, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'), ensure_ascii=False)", "3. Encode UTF-8", "4. SHA-256 hex digest"], "pqc_signature_message": "Signatures computed over content_hash.encode('utf-8') — the HEX STRING, not raw bytes.", "pqc_algorithm": "ML-DSA-65 (Dilithium-3, FIPS 204)" }, "receipt_types": { "DR": { "title": "Delegation Receipt", "key_fields": ["delegation_id","delegator_id","delegate_id","task_scope","authority_budget_delegator","authority_budget_granted","chain_root_id","delegation_depth","content_hash","pqc_signature","created_at","expires_at","status"], "invariant": "authority_budget_granted ≤ authority_budget_delegator" }, "TAR": { "title": "Temporal Admissibility Record", "key_fields": ["tar_id","delegation_id","agent_id","execution_ns","execution_ts","admission_status","dr_status_at_admission","authority_budget","domain","chain_root_id","content_hash","pqc_signature","issued_at"], "invariant": "issued_at MUST precede execution completion. execution_ts bound by pqc_signature." }, "DTR": { "title": "Domain Translation Receipt", "key_fields": ["dtr_id","source_delegation_id","source_domain","target_domain","source_agent_id","target_agent_id","source_authority_budget","translated_budget","translation_discount","chain_root_id","content_hash","pqc_signature","issued_at"], "invariant": "translated_budget ≤ source_authority_budget × (1 - translation_discount)" }, "RCR": { "title": "Runtime Continuity Record", "key_fields": ["rcr_id","tar_id","delegation_id","agent_id","chain_root_id","execution_ns","ces_score","ces_temporal","ces_budget","ces_context","ces_integrity","continuity_status","predecessor_rcr_id","budget_remaining","context_drift_pct","fragmentation_score","content_hash","pqc_signature","issued_at"], "ces_formula": "CES = T×0.30 + B×0.30 + D×0.20 + I×0.20", "continuity_status_thresholds": "NOMINAL(≥75) · MONITORING(50–75) · WARNING(25–50) · CRITICAL(10–25) · HALT(<10)" }, "SAC": { "title": "Semantic Alignment Certificate", "key_fields": ["sac_id","runtime_a","runtime_b","semantic_alignment_map","unresolved_terms","governing_posture","sac_content_hash","pqc_signature_a","pqc_signature_b","effective_from","expires_at"], "status_values": ["ALIGNED","ACKNOWLEDGED_DIVERGENCE","UNRESOLVED"], "atf_core_terms": ["AUTHORITY","ADMISSIBILITY","TRUST","SOVEREIGNTY","RISK","ESCALATION","REVOCATION","LEGITIMACY"], "invariant": "All 8 ATF Core Terms must be present. UNRESOLVED terms default to more restrictive interpretation." }, "STR": { "title": "Semantic Term Registry Entry", "key_fields": ["str_entry_id","runtime_id","term_id","term_version","definition","content_hash","pqc_signature","created_at","effective_from","supersedes_id"] }, "SPV": { "title": "Semantic Policy Vector", "key_fields": ["spv_id","runtime_id","generated_at","atf_core_term_set","spv_hash","pqc_signature"], "spv_hash_note": "SHA-256 of canonical JSON of atf_core_term_set. Two runtimes with identical spv_hash are semantically equivalent." } } } That gives you the field names and hash contracts for all seven receipt types. The DR is your primary anchor for the bridge mapping — chain_root_id links delegation lineage across the full stack. Harold Nunes — OMNIX QUANTUM LTD
